overall.description: Night driving through a foggy cyberpunk city highway in a video game. The camera moves smoothly along wet reflective roads past neon-lit skyscrapers, overpasses, and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway approaching bridge overpass

events.description: crossing over a bridge structure with view of lower highway levels below

agents.ego_description: driving on elevated highway through dense fog, approaching a bridge overpass

entered.detail: skyscraper with red neon signage reading NO ENTRY and other text
vertical illuminated sign with white text
concrete overpass structure with metal railings
tall sodium vapor lamps illuminating the fog

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated highway through a foggy cyberpunk city night. The camera approaches and crosses a bridge structure, revealing lower road levels below. A tall skyscraper with red neon signage dominates the right side while street lights pierce through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass with concrete barriers and overhead sign gantries

events.description: entering covered highway underpass with reduced visibility and concrete walls

agents.ego_description: driving through enclosed foggy highway section under overpasses

entered.detail: dark opening of highway underpass with concrete walls
tall concrete dividers lining the highway edge
overhead metal structure with directional signs

segments.scene_description: The highway enters a more enclosed underpass section with concrete barriers lining the road. Overhead sign gantries appear as the camera drives through the foggy corridor. The tall neon building remains visible on the right while the bridge structure passes out of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with digital billboards and reflective wet pavement

events.description: digital billboards become visible on left side of highway

agents.ego_description: driving along foggy highway past illuminated digital billboards and neon signage

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screen showing colorful graphics
reflective lights embedded in the highway barrier walls

segments.scene_description: The highway opens up again with digital billboards visible on the left side. The road continues through the fog with reflective wet pavement and barrier lights. The tall neon building recedes into the distance on the right as the drive continues through the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along an elevated highway that transitions from an open bridge crossing into a confined underpass before expanding back into a neon-lit cityscape. It begins by crossing a bridge structure that reveals lower road levels below, with a towering skyscraper featuring red neon signage dominating the right side through the dense fog. As the camera moves forward, the highway enters a more enclosed corridor lined with concrete barriers and overhead sign gantries, while the bridge fades from view. The scene then opens up again to reveal glowing digital billboards on the left and reflective wet pavement beneath the street lights. Finally, the road continues through the foggy night as the tall neon building recedes into the distance, leaving the camera to glide further into the cyberpunk environment.
